results.rendered_html:
asaṃskṛta a.
1 Unpolished, not refined or cleansed &c.
2 Not decorated or adorned.
3 One over whom no purificatory rite (any one of the samskāras) has been performed.
— taḥ An ungrammatical form (apaśabda).
